Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a bookable accommodation unit available at Balatasan Beach Resort.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Room entity.

name.description: The name of the room or accommodation type (e.g., 'Cottage', 'Glamping Tent').

price.description: The nightly price of the room in local currency.

capacity.description: The number or range of guests that can be accommodated in the room (e.g., '2' or '10-15').

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the room, typically hosted in Firebase Storage.

description.description: A detailed description of the room, its amenities, and unique features.

Tour.title: Tour
Tour.description: Represents a bookable tour package offered by Balatasan Beach Resort.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Tour entity.

title.description: The title of the tour package (e.g., 'Island Hopping', 'Waterfall Expedition').

pricePerPerson.description: The price of the tour per person in local currency.

duration.description: The typical duration of the tour (e.g., 'Half-day', 'Full-day', '3 hours').

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents a guest's reservation for a room or a tour package.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Booking entity.

userId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the user who made the booking.

itemId.description: Reference to the unique identifier of the booked item (Room or Tour).

itemName.description: The name of the booked item at the time of booking.

startDate.description: The start date of the booking.

endDate.description: The end date of the booking.

status.description: The current status of the booking (e.g., 'Pending Payment', 'Confirmed', 'Cancelled').

totalPrice.description: The total calculated price for the booking.

guestName.description: The full name of the guest.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the booking was created.

paymentImageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded proof of payment image.

definition.description: Publicly accessible collection for all bookable rooms.

params.name: roomId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific room.

definition.description: Publicly accessible collection for all bookable tour packages.

params.name: tourId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific tour package.

definition.description: Private collection storing individual booking records specific to each user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: bookingId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific booking.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who holds the administrative role.
